failure_patterns.claimed_solution: Implemented SSE incremental output helper functions with position tracking
failure_patterns.actual_failure: Helper functions exist but are not called by actual SSE endpoints, causing full buffer replay storms
failure_patterns.prevention_strategy: Integration tests must validate actual endpoint behavior, not just helper function logic

failure_patterns.claimed_solution: Fixed SSE message duplication with buffer slicing
failure_patterns.actual_failure: Massive message duplication (1000+ repeated messages) continues due to full buffer replay
failure_patterns.prevention_strategy: TDD must test actual SSE streaming with real endpoints, not isolated components

failure_patterns.claimed_solution: Backend sends incremental data with position tracking
failure_patterns.actual_failure: Frontend receives cumulative data causing infinite message accumulation
failure_patterns.prevention_strategy: End-to-end contract testing between frontend and backend SSE implementations

failure_patterns.claimed_solution: Added position tracking to prevent duplicate message sending
failure_patterns.actual_failure: Actual SSE endpoints ignore position tracking, sending full buffer on every event
failure_patterns.prevention_strategy: Integration tests must verify position tracking is used by actual SSE message sending logic
